media.name: 20% heat-inactivated human serum with menadione and hemin (PMC10949514)
media.base_medium: 20% heat-inactivated human serum (complex biological fluid; not a chemically defined mineral medium)
media.base_medium_reference: No cited base-medium recipe. This is the assay medium defined in-paper: Nagai et al. (2024), 'Porphyromonas gingivalis PGN_1547 ...', PMC10949514. Organism grown anaerobically; serum is undiluted-basis 20% (v/v), the balance being the assay buffer/broth which the paper does not specify.
media.verification_evidence: Growth curves of P. gingivalis ATCC 33277 and Δpgn_1547 mutant growing in 20% heat-inactivated human serum supplemented with 1 µg/mL menadione and 5 µg/mL hemin ... P. gingivalis ATCC 33277 was cultured anaerobically at 37°C.
media.citation: Medium composition from PMC10949514 (see GrowthDB record).
